name: Rigetti Computing, Inc.

latest_note.title: 10-K Analysis
latest_note.summary: [Financial Performance] Rigetti is transitioning from R&D to initial commercialization, marked by its first QPU sales and growing purchase orders, though revenue remains concentrated in public sector…

top_risks: RGTI faces a high-risk profile characterized by its early-stage operations, significant funding requirements, and substantial technical challenges in quantum computing development

The company's heavy dependence on limited customers and public sector contracts creates revenue concentration risks, while intense global competition and intellectual property concerns add further uncertainty
Material weaknesses in financial controls and supply chain dependencies present additional operational vulnerabilities that could impact growth and stability
